description:
Hi Larry,

We're getting married this fall and love your portfolio. Could you let me know if you have availability for a Saturday in October, and what your wedding coverage packages look like?

Thanks,
Clarice
subject: Wedding booking inquiry — October date availability

description:
Hi Larry,

I'd like to order a couple of prints from the Porch Light series. What sizes are available, and do you offer matte vs. glossy paper? Trying to figure out what fits a 16x20 frame.

Thanks,
Marcus
subject: Print order question — sizing and paper options

description:
Hi Larry,

The forecast looks rough for our outdoor portrait session this weekend. Could we push it to the following Saturday? Same time works for us.

Thanks,
Simone
subject: Reschedule portrait session — weather

description:
Hi Larry,

The download link you sent for our engagement gallery seems to have expired — it says the link is no longer valid. Could you send a fresh one when you get a chance?

Thanks,
Terrell
subject: Gallery download link expired

description:
Hi Larry,

We have a team of six who need updated professional headshots. Do you offer a group rate, and could you come to our office, or would we book studio time?

Thanks,
Nina
subject: Headshot session pricing for small team

description:
Hi Larry,

I received the latest invoice but I think it doesn't reflect the deposit we paid back in February. Could you take a look and confirm the remaining balance?

Thanks,
Dev
subject: Invoice question — deposit already paid

description:
Hi Larry,

The gala is running longer than planned. Are you able to extend coverage by an extra hour or two on the day, and what would the added cost be?

Thanks,
Rachel
subject: Event coverage — additional hours

description:
Hi Larry,

We'd love to book a family portrait session. Weekday mornings work best for us with the kids. Do you have anything open in the next few weeks?

Thanks,
Angela
subject: Family portrait availability — weekday mornings
